pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and latest features.
Replace jackson-module-jaxb-annotations with jackson-module-jakarta-xmlbind-annotations to support Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact uses javax.xml.bind annotations which are removed in Java 11+ and replaced by jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+. Using the old artifact with Jakarta-based dependencies causes compile errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit jakarta.annotation-api dependency as it is now provided by Spring Boot BOM or JDK.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with release flag for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in Java 21. While they might still work, using 'release' is the standard way to ensure cross-compilation and API usage restrictions match the target JDK. Some newer compiler plugins may warn or error on deprecated flags.

src/main/java/com/calt/buroxz/config/CRL.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.

src/main/java/com/calt/buroxz/config/Sec.general_idea: Refactor instance check and cast into a single pattern matching statement.

src/main/java/com/calt/buroxz/service/dt.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ module system restrictions on serializable fields.
src/main/java/com/calt/buroxz/service/dt.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID is not implicitly serializable in Java 14+ without @Serial annotation when using strong encapsulation or specific compiler flags, though often a warning in earlier versions, it is required for strict compliance in newer toolchains.

src/main/java/com/calt/buroxz/service/dt.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.

src/main/java/com/calt/buroxz/web/filter.after: if ((authentication instanceof OAuth2AuthenticationToken token)) { ... OAuth2AuthorizedClient authorizedClient = authorizedClient(token);

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+; using the old Java EE namespace causes deployment failures or classpath conflicts because the container expects Jakarta EE annotations and descriptors.

src/test/java/com/calt/buroxz/config/tim.general_idea: Remove unused static import of java.lang.String.format
Replace String.format call with String.formatted method introduced in Java 15

src/test/java/com/calt/buroxz/config/tim.after: return "SELECT %s FROM jhi_date_time_wrapper where id=%d".formatted(fieldName, id);
